message:
fix: add working-dog guard and atomic per-rig refresh to dog Refresh (gt-94mvj)

Prevents refreshing a working dog worktrees while its agent is active.
Makes Refresh atomic per-rig: state is persisted after each rig so a
failure at rig N leaves rigs 1..N-1 correctly updated. On failure,
removes stale worktree path from state instead of leaving dangling ref.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
